meaning: n.浅滩,沙洲,鱼群,大量adj.水浅的v.(使)变浅,驶入(浅水等),(鱼等)群集
examples: The shark described a circle around the shoal of fish.
Merely observing a shoal does not make it clear which individuals lead and which follow.
Recent research had shown that fish recognised individual "shoal mates", social prestige and even tracked relationships.
The sea around Malapascua has far more for divers than just the Monad Shoal and thresher sharks.
Nearly 25m below the surface, on the Monad Shoal, the waters are quiet.
